overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} \frac {\partial \chi}{\partial \beta} & = \sum_ {i} \frac {\hbar^ {2}}{2 m _ {i}} \left[ - \frac {2 i \beta p _ {i}}{\hbar} \frac {\partial U}{\partial q _ {i}} \chi + \frac {2 i p _ {i}}{\hbar} \frac {\partial \chi}{\partial q _ {i}} - \beta \chi \frac {\partial^ {2} U}{\partial q _ {i} ^ {2}} + \beta^ {2} \chi \left(\frac {\partial U}{\partial q _ {i}}\right) ^ {2} \right. \\ & \quad \left. - 2 \beta \frac {\partial \chi}{\partial q _ {i}} \frac {\partial U}{\partial q _ {i}} + \frac {\partial^ {2} \chi}{\partial q _ {i} ^ {2}} \right] \end{array} \tag {1}\tag{33.8}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} \frac {\partial \chi}{\partial \beta} & = \sum_ {i} \frac {\hbar^ {2}}{2 m _ {i}} \left[ - \frac {2 i \beta p _ {i}}{\hbar} \frac {\partial U}{\partial q _ {i}} \chi + \frac {2 i p _ {i}}{\hbar} \frac {\partial \chi}{\partial q _ {i}} - \beta \chi \frac {\partial^ {2} U}{\partial q _ {i} ^ {2}} + \beta^ {2} \chi \left(\frac {\partial U}{\partial q _ {i}}\right) ^ {2} \right. \\ & \quad \left. - 2 \beta \frac {\partial \chi}{\partial q _ {i}} \frac {\partial U}{\partial q _ {i}} + \frac {\partial^ {2} \chi}{\partial q _ {i} ^ {2}} \right] \end{array} \tag{33.8}
